chapter_title.en: Punishment of betrayal of trust, theft, drinking wine and fornication

text: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْعَمْرَکِیِّ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ع إِنَّ ابْنَ دَاوُدَ یَذْکُرُ أَنَّکَ قُلْتَ لَهُ شَارِبُ الْخَمْرِ کَافِرٌ قَالَ صَدَقَ قَدْ قُلْتُ لَهُ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 16. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from al-’Amraki who said: The narrator told Imam Ridha (a.s.), “Ibn Dawud says that you told him: ‘A drunkard is an infidel?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “He is right and I had told him that.”
